# Project upgrades

## Goal

Upgrade dependencies, runtimes, frameworks, or tooling with controlled blast radius.

## Workflow

1. inventory the current version and known blockers
2. read release notes and breaking changes
3. identify impacted files and tests
4. create an upgrade plan
5. implement the upgrade in bounded steps
6. run focused validation and regression checks

## Good tasks for Copilot

- summarize upgrade blockers
- map breaking changes to this codebase
- prepare an upgrade checklist
- patch straightforward compatibility issues
